title: nOps Scheduler
description: A Scheduler automates resource management tasks such as starting and stopping non-production workloads on a defined schedule to reduce costs.

id.description: The unique identifier of the scheduler.

enabled.description: Whether the scheduler is currently enabled.

project_id.description: The associated nOps AWS Project ID.

schedule.description: Schedule configuration defining when the scheduler runs.

resources.description: List of resources managed by this scheduler.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the scheduler was created.
